data.title: Fastly, Inc. prices an increased $160 million offering of convertible senior notes due 2030 through a private offering.
data.description: Fastly, Inc. (NYSE: FSLY) based in San Francisco disclosed it has priced its private offering of $160 million in 0% convertible senior notes due 2030. The notes were offered to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act. This amount was higher than the initially stated $125 million offering size.
Dollar-loonie pair holds steady around 1.3950 as markets await Canadian jobs data.
Governor of RBI notes ability to provide lasting liquidity and absorb temporary liquidity as needed.
Governor of RBI notes an 11.4% increase in bank credit.
RBI Governor says the economy has shown resilience and India is poised for high growth.
RBI Governor says the flow of resources to the commercial sector has increased.

data.title: Planet Classroom is releasing nine new short films in December featuring youth talent, VR, AI, music, climate stories, and conservation efforts for global audiences to enjoy for free on YouTube.
data.description: Planet Classroom is set to release nine new short films targeting global audiences, including classrooms, families, and youth. These films touch upon various themes such as The Nutcracker, virtual reality history, AI in medicine, climate art, wildlife protection, and powerful human stories. The films will be available for free viewing on YouTube starting in December.

data.title: Paribu buys CoinMENA for USD 240M, extends into MENA region, marking Türkiye's largest fintech deal.
data.description: Turkey's premier digital asset platform has successfully finalized the largest fintech transaction in the country and acquired its initial cross-border digital asset platform, expanding its regulated presence from Turkey to the MENA region. The transaction was completed in Istanbul on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Successful Deye 2025 Dubai Distributor Summit gathered 200+ core partners from Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.
data.description: In December 2025, Deye organized the "Green Industry, Bright Future — Deye 2025 Dubai Distributor Summit" in Dubai, which saw the participation of more than 200 key partners from Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. The event showcased Deye's newest innovations and technologies in the sustainability sector to drive growth and collaboration among stakeholders.
Governor of RBI notes that the reduction in inflation is now broad-based.
CPI inflation seen at 0.6% in Q3 and 2.9% in Q4 of FY26, according to RBI Governor.
Governor of RBI notes that India’s external sector continues to show resilience.
Governor of RBI notes that robust services exports and remittances are expected to maintain a modest current account deficit.
RBI Governor reports India’s forex reserves at $686 billion on November 28.
RBI Governor says the central bank will continue to meet the productive needs of the economy proactively.
Rupee gives up earlier gains, trading 0.1% higher at 89.92 per dollar.

Baidu’s Kunlunxin, Valued at Nearly $3 Billion, Eyes Hong Kong IPO, Sources Say Baidu's AI chip unit, Kunlunxin, is planning a Hong Kong IPO. It recently completed a funding round in the past six months, raising over 2 billion yuan from investors including a China Mobile fund.
RBI Governor says manufacturing activity continues to improve while services remain steady.
